newsSince: In June 2026 Belimo launched the Energy Valve 4 (integrated thermal-energy monitoring) and cited strong Q1 momentum driven by data-center adoption, prompting an outlook upgrade; it is also opening a Danbury, CT data-center cooling Application Center in 2026. Reinforces the data-center/liquid-cooling HVAC thesis, but the name is well-covered and richly valued.

sources.label: Belimo higher target from AI data-center cooling (Finimize)
Belimo MS upgrade on data-center cooling - Investing.com
Belimo higher target on AI DC cooling (Finimize)

verdicts.rankRationale: Move up from 44. June 15 MS Overweight (CHF1,100) quantifies the DC liquid-cooling thesis: 17% of sales, >50% of growth, valves/sensors with possibly shorter replacement cycles. Genuine fundamental firming of the thermal latent-node case; offsets the prior down-rate.
verdicts.bull: Hyperscaler liquid-cooling lifts valve/sensor attach and replacement cycles; DC drives most of Belimo's growth.
verdicts.neutral: Quality compounder, but the upgrade also raises awareness and valuation, capping latent-alpha.
verdicts.bear: At ~CHF916 already near MS target; rich multiple leaves little margin if DC capex moderates.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: DC-cooling revenue mix accelerating per MS upgrade
